feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

we are trying to upload an xml file which is  generated by sap and trying to upload in ksef portal directly as we have some issues to submit in e document cockpit .

It shows following error while uploading .

entry.title: Unable to add new data fields to the email template FIN_CUSINV_EMAIL_TEMPL
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are unable to add new data fields to the email template FIN_CUSINV_EMAIL_TEMPL. We require two fields such as DocumentreferenceID and Customer name to include in the email. We are unable to find relevant business context to add new data fields to the template. 

Could you please provide a possible way to achieve to add required fields to the email template.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: What is the recommended learning roadmap for an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Administrator
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently working as an Administrator for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, and I’m looking for guidance on how to build a clear and structured learning roadmap for my professional development.

I have an active SAP Learning Hub subscription, so I would greatly appreciate recommendations on which Learning Journeys, courses, or certifications are most relevant for someone in my role.

My Objective

I want to understand which skills, topics, and SAP learning paths I should follow to grow from a foundational level to an advanced/expert level in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system administration.

Areas I want to focus on:

  • System administration and operations
  • Identity and access management (IAM)
  • Integrations (Communication Arrangements, APIs, SAP BTP services)
  • Extensibility (In-App and Side-by-Side)
  • Monitoring, lifecycle management, and support processes
  • Automation and operational tools
  • Best practices aligned with SAP Activate
  • Recommended certifications for administrators

 My Key Questions to the Community

  1. Which SAP Learning Journeys are essential for an S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition administrator?
  2. Is there a recommended end‑to‑end roadmap that shows how to progress from beginner to advanced?
  3. Which SAP certifications provide the most value for this career path?
  4. What combination of technical and functional skills should I prioritize to build a strong long‑term profile?
  5. Any practical advice or experiences from people who have followed a similar path?

I truly appreciate any insights, recommendations, or examples that can help me structure a solid career plan in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ecosystem.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Receiving quantities with the TEST RF ENVIRONMENT app, similar to the Receive Produts
entry.content:
The client needs to scan their barcodes to automate the recording of incoming quantities. Currently, EWM is being implemented through the Test RF Environment app; however, it is not handling receiving like the Receive Products app.

Let's look at an example of how the quantities of an item are recorded using the EAN code in the Receive Products APP until the order quantity is completed in S/4HANA PUBLIC EDITION

First, click on Enter ID:

A dialog box called Find a Document appears:

The handling unit 300001057 is placed in the box

Let's simulate scanning the second item, which has the EAN 2050000003820. To do this, we'll click on the barcode icon. You can see that the Received column is blank and contains the UOM CAR.

The following dialog box is displayed and the EAN 2050000003820 is entered

The first scanned amount is displayed, which is why the number 1 is seen in the Received field.

We repeat the process by clicking the scanner icon again; the dialog box then appears, and we enter the EAN 2050000003820 of the item.

It now appears that one more CAR has been scanned; the total number of CAR to be scanned is 6, and since 2 CAR have been scanned, that is why 4 CAR are pending.

In order for the Receive Products app to perform this function, the "GTIN SCAN INCR COUNT" check mark was enabled in the CBC configuration under the "Define Basic Settings for Receive Products" node.

My question is, what is the configuration in CBC or what check mark do I need to enable so that the "TEST RF ENVIRONMENT" app scans by CAR until the order is completed, as shown in the "RECEIVE PRODUCT" app?

In the Maintain User Settings – Radio Frequency application, I already verified my store 5550 and my resource is SHA1-1.

As a first step, upon entering my TEST RF ENVIRONMENT app, the following data is displayed:

Warehouse number: 5550    Resource: SHA1-1   DefPressDvc: SE01    Press Enter.

After Select  03 Inbound Process > 02 Receiving of HUs 

and finally > 01 Rec. Hu By Delivery.

In the Delivery field, enter your delivery number. 180000265.

The incoming delivery is now displayed with the following information:
Delivery: 180000265.
Partner (number and name):1000060
Number of handling units (number of handling units created so far):1
PressEnterto continue.

HU 300001663 was entered and then the press enter.

The product is TRCAME06, and I need to receive 3 CARs. When I click the CHQTY button, as shown in the last image, a field appears to enter the current quantity, but it doesn't accept an EAN like the Receive Products app does.

What configuration allows me to scan each item individually until the order of 3 CARs is complete? I also need it to show me that, for example, 2 CARs have been scanned and 1 CAR is pending to complete the 3-CAR order.

in S/4HANA PUBLIC EDITION

entry.title: How to integrate SAP Subscription Billing with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
I have set up my Subscription Billing, but now would like to know how to integrate it with S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Monitoring Project Costs with Project Financial Booklet - What are the prerequisites?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using the Project Financial Booklet seems to be quite complicated or to have some special prerequisites. When I post standard actual cost to a WBS element, I can't see the costs in this app selecting the project of the WBS element. At the same time I can see costs that were posted a year ago to other projects (bigger selection).   

The “Projects Plan/Actual” app, on the other hand, or the line item app display all costs and postings as normal.

What do I do wrong? Is there anything to set up? 

Thank you in advance for any hint!

Best regards

Rado

entry.title: Exchange Rate Differences Not Generated in Automatic Payments
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and I have encountered a behavior that I do not fully understand regarding the posting of exchange rate differences during the automatic payment run.

Here is the scenario:

  • The supplier invoice is posted in USD on the 18th.

  • The payment is executed in USD on the 20th through the Automatic Payment process.

  • The payment method used is configured as cross‑border and is linked to a USD bank account.

  • However, in the journal entry generated by the automatic payment, no exchange rate difference is posted, even though the payment date is different from the invoice posting date.

If I perform the payment manually, SAP does recalculate the exchange rate on the payment date and correctly posts the exchange rate difference in the journal entry.

My question is: Is there any way in SAP Public Cloud to make the Automatic Payment Run post exchange rate differences when the payment date differs from the invoice date? In other words, is there any configuration that allows the automatic payment process to recalculate the exchange rate or post the realized exchange rate difference?

Any guidance or experience on this topic would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Manage Supplier Line Items- Profit Center is now shwoing in line items
entry.content:
Manage Supplier Line Items- Profit Center is now shwoing in line items

  1.  i have attached one ref sheet in attachment . in line items profit center is now showing
  2. in 2nd case in selection screen profit center is added ,but in line items profit center is not shwoing but profit center is entered in the supplier line items.

entry.content:
As there is no CDS View for Material Valuation History currently available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud; what alternatives are available that could meet my requirements?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Bank Statement Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am performing the bank reconciliation of a vendor payment that had already been posted in the system, using the “Manage Bank Statements” app. When I reconcile it with the corresponding line in the bank statement, I notice that the clearing account shows an open item both in positive and negative amounts.

I also expected that, when reconciling the payment with the bank statement line, the item in the bank clearing account would be automatically cleared, but this is not happening. I would like to understand why this behavior occurs.

My specific questions are:

  • Why does the item in the clearing account not get automatically cleared when the payment is matched with the bank statement?

  • Is it normal for the clearing account to generate two open items (one debit and one credit) after reconciling a payment that was already posted?

  • Should the automatic clearing of the payment with the invoice be executed before or after the bank reconciliation?

  • Does automatic clearing always need to be performed, even when bank reconciliation is done in Bank Statement Processing?

I would appreciate any guidance or experience regarding the correct process flow.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit WM Stock with Internal HU Number Range
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have issue, I try  to upload Stock in Storage Bin and also generate the Handling Unit at the same time for Initial Balance WM. But, after I upload using this format the Handling Unit generated but the stock uploaded without Handling Unit. My purpose is to pack the stock, into Handling Unit that generated using internal number range. 

Please for your guidance.  Thank you 

 

 

Regards

Melani

entry.title: CBC : Set Up Integr Financial Planning * with "you need to perform some manual configuration step"
entry.content: access cbc : Set up Integrated Financial Planning * with "you need to perform some manual configuration step", system allow to open guide but cannot logon to sap support portal, telling error "An account already exists with this username " Please advise how to solve?  I want to create a new project budget category

entry.title: “Stage” Button Not Triggering Any Action in Stage for Production Material (Pull List – EWM)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I would like to understand why the “Stage” button in the Stage for Production Material (Pull List EWM) application is not functioning as expected in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

When I select the required line items and click the Stage button, there is no popup, no follow‑up screen, and no document creation. The system does not display any error or confirmation message either.

To troubleshoot further, I would also like guidance on how to verify the Production Order details relevant to the staging process, and to confirm whether any documents must be created or saved before the staging action becomes available.

Thank you for your support.

Kind regards,

Thanks
Kiran

entry.title: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT error raising when Click Send Mail action but Mail can send
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have implemented a custom RAP action sendMail for business object ZI_PACKINGLISTAPP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The logic is written in a custom class under Source Code Library and is executed from the RAP behavior. The action reads selected records using READ ENTITIES, creates an email using CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE, sets recipient, subject, and HTML body, and then sends the email using lo_mail->send(). However, when the action is triggered from the Fiori app, the OData request fails with runtime error BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT althouthg the email is  sent. We would like to understand why this logic is not working in the RAP context and which part of the implementation is considered illegal by the RAP framework.

 

Below is the implemented logic for reference:

METHOD sendMail.
  READ ENTITIES OF zi_packinglistapp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY PackingListApp
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_results).

  LOOP AT lt_results ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_result>).
    DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
    lo_mail->add_recipient( 'xxx@company.com' ).
    lo_mail->set_subject( 'Status Updated' ).
    lo_mail->set_main(
      cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
        iv_content = 'Notice Item ' &&
<fs_result>-OutboundDeliveryID &&  ' updated. '
        iv_content_type = 'text/html'
      )
    ).
    lo_mail->send( ).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDMETHOD.

Please clarify why this implementation results in BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT in S/4HANA Public Cloud RAP, and advise the correct SAP-recommended approach for sending emails (and adding attachments) triggered from a RAP action.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS view for BP Tax number
entry.content:
How to access Business Partner Tax Number via CDS views

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Setup VAT deferred tax for Switzerland not available
entry.content:
Dear Consultants,

As part of the Help Portal: Deferred Taxes, deferred tax (VAT) is not available for country Switzerland in S/4HANA Public Cloud, although this is a country legal requirement as there is an option to choose VAT return based on payments.

Kindly assist if there is any workaround available as it is important to meet the country legal requirement. Thank you so much.

Best regards,

Hugo

entry.title: Group Reporting - Version Restrictions
entry.content:
How can I restrict access to a specific consolidation version? For example, version A10. I am asking about the best practices that SAP recommends.

We are trying to restrict the A10 versión through  all consolidation business roles.

entry.title: You have to add the Supplier role (FLVN00) to Employment BP
entry.content:
I wanted to create an employee as a supplier, but I get the following message when I select BP role supplier (fin. accounting).

You have to add the Supplier role (FLVN00) to Employment BP


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Open Posting Periods for Specific Ledgers Only
entry.content:
There is a requirement from the business to open 2L, 3L, and P2 ledgers only (not 0L) for specific company codes. The configuration Assign Fiscal Year Variants to Ledgers and Company Codes allow saving of different PPV (with different ledgers) for one company code. Please confirm if this setup is feasible.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
